tracks.rawText: 0:10[Rec] May 27 15:27:29UploadHardstyle track at 150 BPM in G minor, The arrangement features a distorted, pitched 909 kick drum that provides both the percussive impact and the sub-bass melody, A bright, detuned sawtooth lead synth plays a syncopated, rhythmic riff with a short decay and high-pass filter automation, Rapid 16th-note closed hi-hats and a sharp, metallic snare on the backbeat drive the percussion, A secondary, lower-octave square wave synth mirrors the lead melody during the main phrase, The track utilizes gated reverb on the percussion and aggressive sidechain compression to create a pumping effect synchronized with the kick drumPublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] May 27 15:27:29

tracks.rawText: 0:10[Rec] May 27 15:27:00UploadHardcore techno track at 160 BPM in the key of G minor, A distorted, saturated kick drum plays a four-on-the-floor pattern with a heavy sub-bass tail, A high-pitched, metallic synth lead plays a repetitive, syncopated three-note riff with a short decay and high resonance, A sharp, white-noise-heavy snare hits on the backbeats, layered with a crisp closed hi-hat on every eighth note, A distorted acid synth line with an automated resonant filter sweep enters in the second half, playing a sixteenth-note sequence, The arrangement features a sudden breakdown where the kick drum drops out, leaving only the resonant synth lead and a rising white noise snare rollPublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] May 27 15:27:00

tracks.rawText: 0:09[Rec] May 27 15:26:47UploadFunk-rock instrumental, A dry, punchy drum kit plays a syncopated breakbeat with prominent open hi-hat accents on the off-beats, A clean electric guitar performs a percussive, rhythmic scratch riff using muted strums and staccato 16th-note patterns, The electric bass guitar follows a repetitive, syncopated groove that emphasizes the root note with occasional octave jumps, The production is dry with minimal reverb, focusing on rhythmic precision and separation between the bass and percussion, 105 BPM, Key of E minor, 4/4 time signaturePublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] May 27 15:26:47
